headline: Regeneron Eyes Longer EYLEA HD Dosing As Valuation Gap Persists
summary: Regeneron Pharmaceuticals (NasdaqGS:REGN) received FDA approval for extended EYLEA HD dosing intervals for wet age-related macular degeneration and diabetic macular edema. The updated label allows eligible patients to receive injections as infrequently as every 20 weeks after one year of successful treatment. The decision is supported by 96 week efficacy and safety data and expands EYLEA HD dosing flexibility compared with other anti VEGF options. For investors watching Regeneron...
